use_cases: MacOS-style application launcher with magnifying dock icons
Quick access navigation bar for desktop apps and tools
Icon-based dock for launching different sections of a dashboard
ai_summary: A macOS-style dock component featuring glass-morphism aesthetics with semi-transparent, blurred backgrounds. The dock supports icon magnification on hover with smooth spring-based animations using Framer Motion. Icons dynamically scale based on mouse proximity, creating an interactive and polished navigation experience for desktop applications.
